sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Sun sanga phazaw gam nuam om a,
I upna in kigalmuh thei hi;
Ei a’ ding, tua gampha
vantung-ah,
I Pa’n omna hong bawl kholh sak hi.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Nung ciangin a
nopna,
Tua gam pha-ah i kimu ding hi;
Nung ciangin a nopna,
Tua gam pha ah i kimu ding
hi.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Eite in tua gun-gal gam pha-ah,
Thupha ngah mite’ la ngaih sa in;
Dah
ngei nawn lo ding I lung sungah,
Khuisa ngei nawn lo ding tawldam khin.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Hong piak sa
vanglian hong itna pi,
Hong siang sak thupha, pahtawina la;
Tawlnga lo phatna i sa ding
hi,
Hong it vantung Pa Pasian mai ah.
